description: Chronological log of all learning episodes, workflow iterations, and tool configurations. Check this BEFORE attempting any complex task to prevent repeating failed iterations.
concurrency_note: When writing to this file, use the atomic write pattern: write to state_tracker.json.tmp first, then rename to state_tracker.json. If state_tracker.json.lock exists, wait or skip.

episodes.action: Set up Multi-Agent Hybrid Memory Architecture with OpenViking, GraphRAG, Episodic Tracker, and VectorRAG layers.
episodes.outcome: Successfully isolated rigid rules from time-series tracking to prevent context bloat.
episodes.learnings: Initial scaffold works but needs enrichment: missing AGENTS.md for portability, missing .abstract index, no YAML frontmatter versioning, GraphRAG schema too sparse, Episodic schema missing status/parameters fields.

episodes.action: Identified 10 issues across all memory layers. Applied fixes: added AGENTS.md, CLAUDE.md symlink, .abstract index, YAML frontmatter, enriched GraphRAG with 9 nodes and 9 edges, enriched Episodic schema with status/parameters/category/tags, created VectorRAG subdirectories and index.json, added .gitignore, created README.md.
episodes.outcome: All 10 issues rectified. Workspace now fully portable across Cursor, Claude Code, Codex, Copilot, and Windsurf.
episodes.learnings: Always create AGENTS.md as the primary instruction file. Always version schemas. Always add .abstract indexes to OpenViking hierarchies. Seed GraphRAG with meaningful initial nodes to prevent cold-start problems.

episodes.action: Integrated the 6-phase Master Orchestrator protocol into the existing workspace. Created MemoryBank layer (6 files: projectbrief.md, productContext.md, systemPatterns.md, techContext.md, progress.md, activeContext.md). Rewrote AGENTS.md with full orchestrator identity, sub-agent registry, ETS hierarchy, adversarial peer review, anti-hallucination mandates, zero-truncation rules. Upgraded all OpenViking files to v2.0. Expanded GraphRAG from 9 nodes/9 edges to 15 nodes/18 edges.
episodes.outcome: Workspace now implements full Master Orchestrator protocol: Memory Bank for cross-device continuity, ETS decomposition, sub-agent delegation, adversarial peer review, and anti-hallucination/anti-laziness guardrails.
episodes.learnings: The Memory Bank (progress.md + activeContext.md) and EpisodicTracker serve complementary roles: progress.md is human-readable append-only history, while state_tracker.json is machine-readable with structured fields for programmatic querying. Both should be maintained. The sub-agent registry in AGENTS.md provides a standard interface for persona-based delegation.
